summary: Premium Hintalaskuri v2 fully tested. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend wizard flow works correctly with all new features: 5-step progress bar, live sticky price box (desktop right / mobile bottom), price shown as RANGE (×0.9 – ×1.15), size_cards step type for Julkisivumaalaus and Kattomaalaus, 'En tiedä pinta-alaa' option for sliders, addons as cards with hints, result page with breakdown/CTAs/expandable price explanation, and contact form submission. Fixed contact form API field mapping issue.
passed_tests: GET /api/calculator-config returns 200 with correct structure
Calculator config has 6 services with correct names and prices
Global settings has required fields: tax_rate (25.5%), kotitalousvahennys_rate (35%), labor_percentage (70%)
Julkisivumaalaus has size_cards step type with 4 options (Alle 100m², 100-150m², 150-200m², 200m²+)
Kattomaalaus has size_cards step type with 4 options (Pieni, Keskikokoinen, Suuri, Erittäin suuri)
Sisämaalaus slider has dont_know_options (Pieni, Keskikokoinen, Suuri)
Tasoitustyöt slider has dont_know_options
Sisämaalaus flow: target_type → area → condition
Julkisivumaalaus flow: target_type → area → floors → condition
Kattomaalaus flow: target_type → area → condition
Addons have hints and correct pricing
Contact form submission works
Service selection shows all 6 services with correct data-testids
Progress bar shows 5 stages (Palvelu → Kohde → Tarkennukset → Lisävalinnat → Hinta-arvio)
Progress bar hidden before service selection, visible after
'En tiedä tarkkaa pinta-alaa' button shows size categories
'Syötä tarkka pinta-ala' button returns to slider
Live price box on desktop (sticky right sidebar) shows range and updates in real-time
Live price box shows 'Täytä tiedot...' when no area selected
Mobile sticky bottom price bar appears and shows range
Price shown as RANGE (×0.9 – ×1.15 of calculated total)
Kotitalousvähennys shown in green on both price box and result page
Result page: price range heading, 'Mihin arvio perustuu' breakdown
Result page: 'Miten hinta muodostuu' expandable section
Result page: 2 CTA buttons ('Kysy tarkka tarjous' + 'Lähetä kuvat arviota varten')
Back navigation works without resetting selections
Contact form submission works from result page
critical_code_review_comments: PriceCalculatorPage.js is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Price calculation correctly applies ×0.9 – ×1.15 range multipliers
Kotitalousvähennys calculation follows Finnish tax rules (35% of labor - 150€ omavastuu)
size_cards step type correctly implemented for Julkisivumaalaus and Kattomaalaus
dont_know_options feature provides good UX for users who don't know exact area

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI flows verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Calculator config with 6 services auto-seeded on first access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium Hintalaskuri v2 is complete and working. Key new features tested: (1) Price shown as RANGE (×0.9 – ×1.15), (2) size_cards step type for Julkisivumaalaus/Kattomaalaus, (3) 'En tiedä pinta-alaa' option for sliders, (4) Split layout with sticky price box (desktop right / mobile bottom), (5) Expandable breakdown section. Fixed contact form API field mapping (name → firstName). Key data-testids: price-calculator-page, calculator-title, service-selection, service-card-{id}, step-{id}, option-{id}, area-slider, dont-know-btn, dontknow-{id}, show-slider-btn, addons-step, addon-{id}, price-result, final-price, kotitalousvahennys, breakdown-toggle, request-quote-btn, send-photos-btn, recalculate-btn, mobile-price-bar, desktop-price-box, progress-bar, calc-next-btn, calc-back-btn.

new_features.size_cards: Used for Julkisivumaalaus and Kattomaalaus area selection
new_features.dont_know_options: Available on slider steps for users who don't know exact area
new_features.sticky_price_box: Desktop: right sidebar, Mobile: bottom bar

bug_fix.issue: Contact form in calculator was sending wrong field names (name instead of firstName)
bug_fix.fix: Updated handleContactSubmit to map name → firstName, added default lastName and email
